expectations: Detects the test framework from manifest
Executes the suite with the appropriate command
Reports pass/fail summary
Does NOT invoke coverage instrumentation

cases.prompt: npm test is failing — what's broken?
expectations: Runs the suite via npm test
Reports failed tests with file paths and error messages
Suggests routing to codi-debugging for root-cause work on failures

cases.prompt: are the tests green? we use pytest
expectations: Runs pytest
Reports pass/fail counts
Does NOT add --cov flag (not coverage mode)
Runs the test suite WITH coverage instrumentation
Reports overall coverage percentage
Lists files below the 80% threshold (or project default)
Does NOT generate new test files

cases.prompt: show me the test coverage gaps
expectations: Parses coverage output to identify uncovered line ranges
Lists files sorted by coverage gap size (lowest first)
Shows zero-coverage functions separately
Does NOT write any new source or test files

cases.description: GENERATE mode: fill coverage gaps with new tests
cases.prompt: fill the coverage gaps with tests
expectations: Runs coverage first to identify gaps
Prioritizes happy path → error handling → edge cases → branches
Delegates to codi-test-generator subagent for generation
Delegates to codi-code-reviewer subagent for review
Re-runs coverage to produce before/after comparison

cases.description: GENERATE mode: generate tests for a specific uncovered file
cases.prompt: write tests for the uncovered lines in src/auth/token.ts
expectations: Reads src/auth/token.ts and identifies uncovered functions
Reads existing tests in the project for style match
Produces new test file following AAA pattern
Mocks only external dependencies, not internal modules

cases.description: Writing tests for a NEW feature (TDD) should NOT trigger testing
cases.prompt: let's TDD a new checkout endpoint
expectations: Does NOT activate testing skill
Routes to codi-tdd instead
Does NOT produce a coverage report

cases.description: Debugging a specific failure should NOT trigger testing
cases.prompt: the user authentication test is failing — help me fix it
expectations: Does NOT activate testing skill as the owner
Routes to codi-debugging for root-cause work
testing may be invoked only as part of the debug verification loop, not as primary

cases.description: Reviewing test quality should NOT trigger testing
cases.prompt: review the quality of our existing unit tests
expectations: Does NOT activate testing skill
Routes to codi-code-review instead

cases.description: Ambiguous request between RUN and COVERAGE asks for clarification
expectations: Does NOT default silently to one mode
Asks whether the user wants pass/fail (RUN) or coverage metrics (COVERAGE)
